title: dysoxylum swaminathanianum
intro: Dysoxylum swaminathanianum, also known as Swaminathan's Dysoxylum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. Native to the Western Ghats of India, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Dysoxylum swaminathanianum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant are often used in traditional medicine, and it can be consumed in the form of decoctions or infusions, with its leaves and bark being the most commonly used parts for medicinal purposes.
